name: Naamah
oracleText:
Menace
Whenever you sacrifice an artifact or creature, target opponent loses 1 life and you scry 1.
Whenever you discard a card, create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn.
flavorText: "And the sister of Tubal-cain was Naamah." — Genesis 4:22
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Lamech family artwork to keep Naamah within the same genealogical visual tradition.
title: Daughter of the First Cities

classics.artist: anonymous printmaker after Hans Sebald Beham
